message:
fix: resolve clippy trivially_copy_pass_by_ref and cast_precision_loss warnings

- main.rs: Change capability_remediation to take PolicyDecision by value
  instead of by reference (1 byte Copy type)
- risk_scorer_golden_fixtures.rs: Allow cast_precision_loss on usize→f64
  for test score averaging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
